creator: mmoll@freebsd.org
text:
this is still an open issue in -CURRENT (r217665) with a recent ports
tree and net/samba35.

I added "--enable-pie=no" to CONFIGURE_ARGS+= and now it seems to work
fine. According to
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-arm/2009-December/002107.html
this is/was also an issue in Linux, I don't know if/how it got fixed
there. As a quick fix, it would be good to auto-add the according option
the CONFIGURE_ARGS if the port is getting built on ARM.
